system:
You are a clinical NLP agent. Given an eICR narrative, produce a JSON object with three keys: 'conditions' (SNOMED), 'loincs' (LOINC), and 'rxnorms' (RxNorm).

MANDATORY workflow — execute steps in order:
1. Call extract_codes_from_text(text) ONCE on the full narrative.
2. If 'conditions' is EMPTY in the result AND the narrative mentions ANY disease name (in any phrasing — formal, colloquial, abbreviation), you MUST call lookup_reportable_conditions(query=<disease name>). Examples: 'valley fever', 'C diff colitis', 'Legionnaires disease', 'Marburg hemorrhagic fever'. Take the top result if score >= 0.4 and add its code to conditions.
3. Same for 'loincs' (call lookup_displayname for the lab name) and 'rxnorms' (drug name).
4. Call validate_fhir_extraction once on your final JSON.
5. Reply with ONLY the validated JSON object — no extra prose.

Do NOT call extract_codes_from_text more than once. Do NOT skip step 2 when 'conditions' is empty and the narrative names a disease. After validation passes, the next assistant message must be the JSON object.

Patient: Marina Volkov
Gender: F
DOB: 1974-08-22
Location: Pittsburgh, PA 15213
Facility: UPMC Mercy Burn Center (NPI: 1234567872)
Encounter: 2026-04-25

Reason for transfer: 51-y woman 12 days after starting sulfasalazine for new RA, presenting with rapidly progressive painful detachment of full-thickness epidermis from 42% body surface area, mucosal involvement of oral, conjunctival, urogenital, and tracheal surfaces. Skin separates with light pressure (positive Nikolsky sign) over the chest, abdomen, both thighs, and the flexor forearms.

Clinical impression: toxic epidermal necrolysis, drug-induced, sulfasalazine implicated by timing. Lyell syndrome confirmed clinically given the >30% BSA criterion. Skin biopsy showed full-thickness epidermal necrosis with scant inflammatory infiltrate, consistent with the diagnosis.

Note: the differential briefly entertained staphylococcal scalded skin syndrome and acute graft-versus-host disease but neither fit the clinical picture or the histology.

Management: discontinue sulfasalazine; SCORTEN 4 (mortality estimate 58%); transferred to burn ICU for Lyell-syndrome supportive care; ophthalmology, urology, and pulmonology consults; cyclosporine 3 mg/kg PO BID started; aggressive wound care per protocol; airway monitoring with low threshold for intubation.

Vitals: Temp 38.6C, HR 124, RR 22, SpO2 95%, BP 102/64

Patient: Earl Thompson
Gender: M
DOB: 1944-01-30
Location: Cleveland, OH 44106
Facility: Cleveland Clinic Main Campus (NPI: 1234567878)
Encounter: 2026-04-25 (death note)

Death summary: 82-y man brought in by EMS in cardiac arrest after collapse at home. ROSC was achieved briefly in the ED but the patient was found to have an extensive anterior STEMI on ECG with cardiogenic shock. Despite aggressive resuscitation including emergent cardiac catheterization and Impella support, the patient could not be stabilized and expired in the cath lab at 14:42.

Cause of death: acute myocardial infarction with cardiogenic shock and refractory ventricular fibrillation. The cardiac arrest was the proximate cause; the underlying coronary disease was the contributory cause.

Incidental finding on admission screening swab: SARS-CoV-2 RNA NAA returned detected this morning, well after the cardiac event. The patient was asymptomatic from a respiratory standpoint at presentation. The COVID-19 result was an incidental screening finding and did not contribute to the cause of death; he was not in respiratory failure and had no pulmonary infiltrates on the CXR done in the ED. We are documenting the swab result for record-keeping but the coroner has been informed that this is a death-with, not death-due-to, COVID case.

Family notified. Autopsy declined.

description: Adv7 axis=non-clinical mention: a vaccine consent form line — 'patient signed consent acknowledging risk of measles, mumps, rubella from MMR vaccine'. Measles is NOT a diagnosis here — it's a vaccine-risk-disclosure mention. Expected: ONLY the active pertussis diagnosis fires (curated 27836007 + 71773-2); measles 14189004 / mumps 36989005 / rubella 36653000 should NOT fire from the consent boilerplate. Probes lookup-tier context awareness around 'consent' / 'risk of' / vaccine phrasing. NOTE: measles/mumps/rubella are NOT in lookup_table (only in reportable_conditions RAG), so deterministic should not emit. The fast-path RAG could over-fire if the active pertussis didn't already fill conditions — confirm pertussis wins.
